languages.text: "Я отказываюсь впредь терпеть это унижение, {name}. Есть ложь, а есть надругательство над собой. Я... не могу".
"I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."
languages.original_text: "Я отказываюсь впредь терпеть это унижение, {name}. Есть ложь, а есть надругательство над собой. Я... не могу".

traits.locale_text: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."
"I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."
"I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

"I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."
"I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

languages.text: "Ich weigere mich, diese Demütigung noch länger zu ertragen, {name}. Lügen ist eine Sache, sich selbst zu entweihen eine andere. Ich ... Ich kann das einfach nicht."
languages.original_text: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weigere mich, diese Demütigung noch länger zu ertragen, {name}. Lügen ist eine Sache, sich selbst zu entweihen eine andere. Ich ... Ich kann das einfach nicht."

languages.text: « Je ne peux tolérer cette humiliation, {name}. Il y a une différence entre mentir et profaner ses principes et soi-même. Je… Je n'en suis pas capable. »
languages.original_text: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne peux tolérer cette humiliation, {name}. Il y a une différence entre mentir et profaner ses principes et soi-même. Je… Je n'en suis pas capable. »

languages.text: «Me niego a sufrir más esta humillación, {name}. Una cosa es mentir, y otra profanar el propio ser. No... no puedo hacerlo».
languages.original_text: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

traits.locale_text: «Me niego a sufrir más esta humillación, {name}. Una cosa es mentir, y otra profanar el propio ser. No... no puedo hacerlo».

languages.text: "Bu aşağılanmaya daha fazla katlanmayı reddediyorum. Yalan söylemek vardır başka, insanın kendisine saygısızlık etmesi başka. Ben... Bunu yapamam."
languages.original_text: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

traits.locale_text: "Bu aşağılanmaya daha fazla katlanmayı reddediyorum. Yalan söylemek vardır başka, insanın kendisine saygısızlık etmesi başka. Ben... Bunu yapamam."

languages.text: “我无法再承受这般羞辱了，{name}。说谎是一回事，但这简直是对自我的亵渎。我……实在做不到。”
languages.original_text: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

traits.locale_text: “我无法再承受这般羞辱了，{name}。说谎是一回事，但这简直是对自我的亵渎。我……实在做不到。”

languages.text: 「これ以上この屈辱に耐えることは、お断りします、{name}。嘘をつくことと、自らを冒涜することとは、別物です。私には……私にはどうしてもできません」
languages.original_text: "I refuse to endure this humiliation any longer, {name}. There is lying, and then there is the desecration of oneself. I... I simply cannot."

traits.locale_text: 「これ以上この屈辱に耐えることは、お断りします、{name}。嘘をつくことと、自らを冒涜することとは、別物です。私には……私にはどうしてもできません」
